findings.summary: Consequential actions were not resolved from exact grants and operating context
findings.disposition: The default-deny resolver now requires exact transition grants, active assignment, effective time, scope, organization, canonical state, declared availability, preconditions, record evidence, and synchronization policy; exhaustive positive and negative tests pass.

findings.summary: Review states could inherit mismatched fixture or event evidence
findings.disposition: Every named state resolves one exact state contract; incompatible fixture overrides are rejected, operational branches resolve exact scenario and event evidence, and model-only branches assert neither.

findings.summary: The plan-to-verification narrative compressed distinct responsibilities
findings.disposition: WF-001 now traverses SCR-001 through SCR-006 with eight exact append-only events and explicit responsibility allocation across planning, approval, dispatch, field reporting, and verification.

findings.summary: Visible operational metrics included unsupported inferred values
findings.disposition: Partial, progress, lineage, timing, area, and reconciliation values now derive only from typed fixture records; absent evidence renders an explicit pending or no-evidence state.

findings.summary: The payroll correction record mixed labor and harvest settlement semantics
findings.disposition: REC-062 now contains labor-specific worker, assignment, submitted and corrected hours, variance, rate, amount owed, authority, lineage, and resolution facts; validators reject load, weight, fruit, and settlement fields.

findings.summary: Clickable prototypes did not prove exact append-only operating boundaries
findings.disposition: Prototype replay now validates exact actor, state, evidence, base version, synchronization mode, idempotency, and append-only behavior, including wrong-actor, stale-base, offline, and conflict rejection tests.

findings.summary: Scenario fallback could imply operational evidence that was not present
findings.disposition: Scenario fallback was removed; model-only states expose context-only fixtures while leaving scenario and operational event identifiers empty.

findings.summary: Initial field viewports did not reliably expose an enabled next action
findings.disposition: SCR-005, SCR-041, and SCR-042 now show complete enabled controls inside the initial 390 by 844 viewport, verified with fresh-page geometry checks and refreshed captures.

findings.summary: Accessibility evidence did not exhaustively cover every required state
findings.disposition: All 64 review states now run automated WCAG A and AA checks with zero violations; keyboard, focus, live-region, non-color, reduced-motion, and target-size behavior is covered.

findings.summary: Focus treatment and mobile navigation needed stronger outdoor affordance
findings.disposition: Semantic focus tokens, a dual-ring focus treatment, start-aligned mobile shell, and a 52-pixel menu control now preserve visible keyboard and touch affordance.

findings.summary: Responsive reflow and print responsibilities lacked durable evidence
findings.disposition: The suite now captures 720 by 512 reflow for responsive and desktop routes and print PDFs for verification, time review, cost allocation, and evidence export.

findings.summary: Figma handoff maps omitted required conditional metadata
findings.disposition: The Figma entry schema declares every conditionally required property, and token, component, screen, and prototype maps include unique stable identifiers, implementation exports, semantic metadata, and current source digests.

findings.summary: The model-only cost allocation error state contradicted its context totals
findings.disposition: Model-only reconciliation now derives no operational measure, the banner identifies a hypothetical containment branch, the component states that no operational variance is asserted, and rendered tests reject the balanced-total claim.

findings.summary: The legacy PKT-001 packet reused current action IDs with obsolete meanings
findings.disposition: PKT-001 remains only as a standalone factory regression artifact and is excluded from the active packet registry, trace graph, master manifest, and WAVE-001 approved construction coverage.
